case_title: ROAMAN, CHESTER A. vs. PICCININI, RON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROAMAN, CHESTER A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PICCININI, RON POWDRILL, BRIAN B.
